The Hills Have Eyes II (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,804,166Details
International Box Office $16,662,372
Worldwide Box Office $37,466,538
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $31,150,061
Total $31,150,061
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,686,362 (46.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,447 opening theaters/2,465 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,165,378

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 23rd, 2007 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
Video Release: July 17th, 2007 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Hills Have Eyes 2, The
MPA Rating: R for prolonged sequences of strong gruesome horror violence and gore, a rape and language
Running Time: 89 minutes
Franchise: Hills Have Eyes
Plot point: Cannibalism, Mutants, Rescue
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
